economic_notes: Three controlled entities accounted for by modified equity method: Wapsewsepi Enterprises Ltd., Creeland Resources Inc., and 18805424 Alberta Ltd. Agricultural Benefits Trust Fund managed by RBC Wealth Management with balance of $39,886,078. Line of credit of $200,000 with Peace Hills Trust at prime plus 2%.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 — not 2024. Two funds consolidated (Operating and Trust Funds); three entities (Wapsewsepi Enterprises Ltd., Creeland Resources Inc., 18805424 Alberta Ltd.) accounted for by modified equity method. Large Agricultural Benefits Trust Fund of ~$39.9M held by RBC Wealth Management. Statement of Change in Net Financial Assets shows excess of revenues over expenditures as $1,467,189 which differs from the $137,922 on the income statement — the difference relates to trust fund earnings recognized through the accumulated surplus schedule. Prior year figures restated. No schedule of remuneration included in the document.
